english: Turn Body and Left Heel Kick
visual: Pivots on the supporting leg, arms cross at the chest, then extends the left leg forward heel-first as the arms open wide.
motion_description: The motion begins with a weight shift onto the right leg, initiating a continuous 180-degree pivot of the body to the right. During the turn, the arms sweep down and outward, then gather inward to cross at chest level, palms facing the body. Still balancing on the flexed right leg, the practitioner lifts the left knee. The movement concludes with a slow, deliberate left heel kick forward as the laterally crossed arms simultaneously extend outward to shoulder level in opposite directions, finishing in a steady, held pose.
